test_failures.message:
Refute with == failed, both sides are exactly equal
code: refute r1.name == r2.name
left: "PERSON_1"
test_failures.test: test distinct non-string and string values are not conflated into one pseudonym

test_failures.message:
Expected truthy, got false
code: assert Map.has_key?(mapping, 42)
arguments:

         # 1
         %{"42" => "PERSON_1"}

         # 2
         42
test_failures.test: test mapping/2 keys are the original values, not stringified copies
